summary: BLOCK 143 Crown Jewel Expansion & Hierarchy - All features verified and working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 143 testing complete. All Crown Jewel features verified: (1) See All Crown Jewels page at /nectar/crown-jewels shows full grid with 37 cards including value badges ($381, $177, etc. in honey-orange style), variant info (Crown icon + variant name), and global owner counts. (2) Crown Jewel cards on Nectar page (12 cards) navigate correctly to /variant/:discogs_id. (3) Crown Jewel cards on See All page navigate correctly to /variant/:discogs_id. (4) Variant page shows loading spinner (Loader2 animate-spin). (5) Variant page stats display real data (Owners: 8,564, Wantlist: 14,408, Lowest: $146.67) - uses '—' placeholder for null values instead of '0'. (6) 'back to nectar' link works correctly. All data-testid attributes properly implemented.

verified_features.notes: Grid displays 37 cards, value badges show prices in honey-orange style (e.g., $381, $177, $97)

verified_features.feature: Crown Jewel cards on Nectar page navigate to /variant/:discogs_id
verified_features.notes: 12 cards on Nectar page, clicking navigates to correct variant URL (tested with discogs_id 26090860)

verified_features.feature: Crown Jewel cards on See All page navigate to /variant/:discogs_id
verified_features.notes: 37 cards on See All page, clicking sa-cj-26090860 navigates to /variant/26090860

verified_features.feature: Variant page has loading spinner while fetching data
verified_features.notes: Loader2 component with animate-spin class displays during page load

verified_features.feature: Variant page stats show real data (not '0' for loading)

verified_features.feature: See All page shows variant info with Crown icon and global owner count
